productDisplayName: Rockport Women Jeanie Thong Perf Black Flats
description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, the Jeanie Thong Perf flip flop from rockport makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it works great with all kinds of clothing.UpperSoft leather strap in a thong style, with diamond-shaped perforations and has a toe separatorPadded suede footbed for exemplary comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with brand logo styled grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the mildly raised heel for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the footbedDo not store in direct sunlight
